insight:
Yesterday was a solid day! Your 5.1km run at 160 bpm average shows good aerobic effort without overdoing it just 5 days out from Chester. That 2,729 calorie burn is impressive, though with race week here, we want to be mindful of not creating too big a deficit. Your 7.4 hours of sleep and low stress level of 21/100 show your body is handling the taper well.

Your HRV at 112ms sits perfectly in your optimal zone, and that 45 bpm resting heart rate indicates excellent recovery. These numbers give you the green light for today's planned session - your nervous system is fresh and ready. No need to modify anything; your body is responding beautifully to the taper.

With race day so close, focus on topping up your glycogen stores today. Aim for the higher end of your carb intake and ensure you're hitting that 175g protein target to support recovery. Your body's primed - let's fuel it right!
